mapper.sql:
boardNo, memberUid,
SUBSTRING_INDEX( SUBSTRING_INDEX(boardType, '/', 2), '/', -1 ) AS category1,
CASE WHEN LENGTH(boardType) - LENGTH(REPLACE(boardType, '/', '')) >= 2 THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(boardType, '/', -1) ELSE '' END AS category2,
title, content, createdAt, answer, answeredAt
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM board
ORDER BY boardNo DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT
FROM board
WHERE boardNo = #{boardNo} AND boardType LIKE 'qna/%'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO board ( memberUid, boardType, title, content, createdAt, answer, answeredAt ) VALUES ( #{memberUid},
CONCAT( 'qna/', #{category1}, '/', #{category2} ),
#{title}, #{content}, NOW(), NULL, NULL )
mapper.update:
UPDATE board
SET answer = #{answer}, answeredAt = NOW()
WHERE boardNo = #{boardNo} AND boardType LIKE 'qna/%'

UPDATE board
SET answer = NULL, answeredAt = NULL
WHERE boardNo = #{boardNo} AND boardType LIKE 'qna/%'
